---
title: "Revise & Revisit"
format: html
editor: 
  markdown: 
    wrap: 72
---

Go Full Circle! - How to revise your existing Flowchart Survey Q

-   Rerun Decision Tool

-   Do another project!

-   Consider adding a function that changes color of flowchart
    components (blue = calm!)

    ![](images/under-construction.png)
